title: ortachne erectifolia
intro: Ortachne erectifolia, also known as the erect Ortachne, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Native to Australia, this plant has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ortachne erectifolia include the potential treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
